column14: Optative mood; expresses wishes of the speaker; (I) would that
column15: Obligatory mood; expresses imperatives and obligations; must, would, should, shall, go
column24: Vocative case; used for calls and namings
column26: Accusative case; used for direct objects
column27: Dative case; used for indirect objects
column29: Locative postposition (in, inside, into, at, by, on, upon)
column33: Benefactive postposition (for, about, by, in order to help, for the purpose of)
